productDisplayName: Franco Leone Men Black Flip Flops
description: Cast a timeless impression in comfort with this pair of franco leone leather flip flops. Give your casual wear a twist of fashion with this pair and be confident of your style statement wherever you go.UpperSoft and wide thong style leather straps with top-stitching to support the midfootLeather toe separatorMetallic button detail on the strapErgonomic, softly padded, leather footbed with stitch detailing for comfort and perforationsOutsoleCurved TPU outsole with strategically placed textured lugs for absolute grip on various surfacesFlip flop careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
